basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Delhi Project Technical Support - II Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Delhi (AIIMS Delhi)
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Delhi (AIIMS Delhi) Project Technical Support - II Notification 2026 has been released on 29-05-2026 on the official website of AIIMS Delhi. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the AIIMS Delhi Project Technical Support - II Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 30 years Age relaxation as per rules.

qualification.education_qualification: 12th (Sciences) + Diploma (M.T./D.M./T.Engg or equivalent) with 5 years' experience OR graduate degree in relevant subject with 2 years' experience
qualification.details: 12th (Sciences) + Diploma (M.T./D.M./T.Engg or equivalent) with 5 years' experience OR graduate degree in relevant subject with 2 years' experience

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the AIIMS Delhi Project Technical Support - II Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 16-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of AIIMS Delhi to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for AIIMS Delhi Project Technical Support - II Recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form for the AIIMS Delhi Project Technical Support - II posts is 16th June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have completed 12th (Sciences) with a Diploma in M.T./D.M./T.Engg or equivalent and possess 5 years of experience, or hold a graduate degree in a relevant subject with 2 years of experience.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Project Technical Support - II position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for this post is 30 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per government rules.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Technical Support - II role?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 20,000 plus HRA as admissible.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Project Technical Support - II post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Project Technical Support - II position.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for AIIMS Delhi Project Technical Support - II recruitment?
faq.answer: There is no application fee mentioned for General/OBC and SC/ST categories.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the AIIMS Delhi Project Technical Support - II recruitment will be based on an Interview.

faq.question: Q8. Is this a contractual job?
faq.answer: Yes, the recruitment for the Project Technical Support - II post is on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the Important Links section of this article.

faq.question: Q10. What is the official website of AIIMS Delhi?
faq.answer: The official website of All India Institute of Medical Sciences Delhi is aiims.edu.
